response:
I'm excited to share the proposed shooting schedule with you. We've managed to fit all the necessary scenes into a tight 7-day shoot, spanning from Day 1 to Day 7. Here's a breakdown of what we'll be capturing each day: 

On Day 1, we'll be shooting the kitchen scene at the Paper Street House, followed by the living room scene on Day 2. Day 3 takes us to the airplane cabin, while Day 4 will be spent at the downtown high-rise office. We'll then move on to the exterior dive bar parking lot on Day 5, followed by the basement bar on Day 6, and finally, the support group scene at the church basement on Day 7.

I'm pleased to report that we were able to stick to all the original constraints, without having to make any compromises. This schedule should provide a great foundation for our production.

In terms of budget, we're looking at a total cost of $0.00, which is well within our allocated budget of $999,999.00. This leaves us with ample room for any unexpected expenses or opportunities that may arise during production.

Overall, I'm confident that this schedule will serve us well, and I'm looking forward to working with you to bring this project to life.
